FROM: Nina Petrova

Dear Marcus Webb and the Renewal Committee,

I am formally submitting this proposal for the renewal of our current contract valued at $120,000. Over the past term, our partnership has delivered measurable results including [insert specific performance metrics, e.g., 15% increase in data accuracy, 20% reduction in processing time, $X cost savings]. Please review this proposal and provide your decision by September 1, 2025. I look forward to continuing our successful partnership.

Best regards,
Nina Petrova
